hubspot.note: CRM — pipeline stages, deal data, contact records, activity history

slack.note: Team communication — GTM pulse delivery, capacity alerts, churn signal digests, deal desk notifications

gdrive.note: Document storage — annual plan docs, OCV catalog, unit-of-growth baseline, board materials

linear.note: Issue tracking — churn escalation tickets, deal desk SLA breach issues, planning cycle tasks

zapier.note: Workflow automation — cross-system data triggers, alert routing, CRM field update hooks

gainsight.note: CS Platform — health scores, renewal dates, adoption signals, churn risk flags
